extortion.description: Wesley Heating & Cooling is an HVAC company based in Green Bay, Wisconsin, specializing in heating, cooling, and air conditioning services since 1951. They offer repair, replacement, and maintenance services for various heating and cooling systems, including geothermal heat pumps and ductless mini-splits. Their intended clients include homeowners in Green Bay, Oshkosh, Fond du Lac, and surrounding areas, looking for reliable and efficient HVAC solutions. Wesley Heating & Cooling is committed to customer satisfaction, providing community service, maintenance plans, and financing options for new installations.
